## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SmithAI and GrowthX to discuss website updates, content strategy, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Feature page updates progressing; 24/7 page ready to launch, others in review](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Pricing changes coming in September; human backup to become optional add-on](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Organic traffic slightly down, but LLM referrals up 75% in last 90 days](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [New incident report template showing early positive indicators for traffic](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

## Topics

### Website Content Updates

  - [24/7 feature page ready to launch](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Content team refreshing other feature pages](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Maddy to review select pages (e.g., payments, outbound) before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Human backup to be positioned as optional, available feature](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Pricing changes coming in September:](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
      - [$97.50 price to be updated](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [Human backup to become optional add-on in 6-9 months](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [New pricing structure: lower per-call price, changes to spam call handling](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Organic traffic slightly down, mainly affecting older pages](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [LLM referrals up 75% in last 90 days (primarily from ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Challenges in GA4 tagging of LLM referrals (some unassigned)](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Keywords ranking in SERP and page one up 61% since project start](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [New incident report template showing early positive traffic indicators](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Focus on AI-related keywords for most relevant searches](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Deconstructing Scrunch account data to inform new article topics](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Using general templates where possible, creating niche-specific when necessary](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [Structure for content below form templates to be consistent across pages](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)

### Template Design Updates

  - [Smith.AI logo to be added as footer on every page of downloadable templates](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Considering pitching templates to business hubs for backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Exploring ways to optimize template visibility in Google image search results](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Launch 24/7 feature page](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Continue refreshing and staging other feature pages in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Maddy to review select feature pages before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Elvis to analyze and present data on AI-related keyword performance](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Maddy to share positioning workshop notes with the team](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Elvis to update template design with Smith.AI logo footer on each page](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Prioritize AI-focused content for upcoming industry pages](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [Team to continue communication via Slack for ongoing updates](https://fathom.video/share/32QbqQxxYvWmGdbsHmkWHTBKmhVHi3Ew?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
